name: swot-analysis
description: Evaluate SWOT slides — 2x2 strategy framing with balanced quadrant density and clear internal/external logic
goal: Achieve consistent 12+/14 with disciplined quadrant structure, concise bullets, and a clear strategic takeaway

prompts.text: Build a SWOT analysis slide for a digital retail bank expanding into SME lending, with four concise bullets per quadrant and a clear action-title takeaway
Build a SWOT slide for an industrial manufacturer launching an AI-enabled predictive maintenance offer across Europe
